Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

Balancing line for non-current assets, not ACT.
Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning-period cash on cash flow, not the balance-sheet target.

candidates.row_label: Net increase in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Change in cash, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Net cash generated by operating activities
candidates.why: Operating cash flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Net cash outflow from acquisition and other shares
candidates.why: Investing flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Net cash (used in)/generated by investing activities
candidates.why: Investing cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Net cash (used in)/generated by financing activities
candidates.why: Financing cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.
Balancing line, not the reported cash balance.
Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Specific non-current liability line, not LCT.
Unique balance-sheet line for current maturities of long-term debt; clearly part of short-term debt and excludes leases.
Cash flow movement, not a balance-sheet debt balance.

variables.notes: Current debt is ambiguous because the balance sheet has two identical 'Borrowings' labels (non-current and current), and the JSON output cannot distinguish which occurrence is intended. I selected the unique current-maturity debt line that clearly belongs in STD and excludes leases, but this may omit any separate short-term borrowings/overdrafts.

candidates.why: Best match for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Deferred taxes are non-current timing differences, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it is the explicit current tax liability line on the balance sheet.
